13 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law2/VariableAccessor.h"
14 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law2/Derivative.h"
15 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law2/EvaluationMode.h"

20 BEGIN_LAW_NAMESPACE
21 
22 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
23 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
24 
25 /*
26  * \ingroup Law
27  * \brief Interface de fonction pour les lois
28  *
29  * Utilis�e pour l'�valuation avec State et l'affichage
30  *
31  */
32 class IFunction
33 {
34 public:
35 
36  virtual ~IFunction() {}
37 
38 public:
39 
41  virtual Integer id() const = 0;
42 
44  virtual Arcane::String name() const = 0;
45 
47  virtual PropertyVector in() const = 0;
48 
50  virtual PropertyVector out() const = 0;
51 
53  virtual PropertyVector parameters() const = 0;
54 
56  virtual bool isDifferentiable() const = 0;
57 
59  virtual bool isParameter() const = 0;
60 
62  virtual void evaluate(const VariableAccessor& v,
63  const Arcane::ItemGroup& g,
64  EvaluationMode mode,
65  Arcane::Integer max_nb_unknowns = 0) const = 0;
66 
68  virtual void evaluate(const PartialVariableAccessor& v,
69  const Arcane::ItemGroup& g,
70  EvaluationMode mode,
71  Arcane::Integer max_nb_unknowns = 0) const = 0;
72 
74  virtual void evaluate(const ArrayAccessor& v,
75  const Arcane::Integer& begin,
76  const Arcane::Integer& end,
77  EvaluationMode mode,
78  Arcane::Integer max_nb_unknowns = 0) const = 0;
79 
81  virtual void evaluate(const ScalarAccessor& v,
82  EvaluationMode mode,
83  Arcane::Integer max_nb_unknowns = 0) const = 0;
84 
86  virtual void derivativesCorrection(const VariableAccessor& v,
87  const Arcane::ItemGroup& g,
88  Law::PropertyVector graph_dependencies,
89  std::map<Law::Property, Law::PropertyVector> in_composed_derivative_ofs,
90  Arcane::Integer nb_unknown_resize) const = 0;
91 
93  virtual void derivativesCorrection(const PartialVariableAccessor& v,
94  const Arcane::ItemGroup& g,
95  Law::PropertyVector graph_dependencies,
96  std::map<Law::Property, Law::PropertyVector> in_composed_derivative_ofs,
97  Arcane::Integer nb_unknown_resize) const = 0;
98 
100  virtual void derivativesCorrection(const ArrayAccessor& v,
101  const Arcane::Integer& begin,
102  const Arcane::Integer& end,
103  Law::PropertyVector graph_dependencies,
104  std::map<Law::Property, Law::PropertyVector> in_composed_derivative_ofs,
105  Arcane::Integer nb_unknown_resize) const = 0;
106 
108  virtual void derivativesCorrection(const ScalarAccessor& v,
109  Law::PropertyVector graph_dependencies,
110  std::map<Law::Property, Law::PropertyVector> in_composed_derivative_ofs,
111  Arcane::Integer nb_unknown_resize) const = 0;
112 };
113 
114 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
115 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
116 
117 // Pour le debug
118 inline std::ostream& operator<<(std::ostream& nout, const IFunction& f)
119 {
120  if(f.isDifferentiable())
121  nout << "- (differentiable)";
122  else
123  nout << "- (non-differentiable)";
124  nout << " function[id=" << f.id() << "] : ";
125  nout << " in = { ";
126  for(Arcane::Integer i=0; i < f.in().size(); ++i)
127  nout << f.in()[i].name() << " ";
128  nout << "}, out = { ";
129  for(Arcane::Integer i=0; i < f.out().size(); ++i)
130  nout << f.out()[i].name() << " ";
131  nout << "}, params = { ";
132  for(Arcane::Integer i=0; i < f.parameters().size(); ++i)
133  nout << f.parameters()[i].name() << " ";
134  nout << "}";
135  return nout;
136 }
137 
138 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
139 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
140 
141 END_LAW_NAMESPACE
142

144 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
145
